journey.name: 01-records
journey.description: 记账增删改：支出/收入/转账 + 手续费/优惠/标签/关联资产。前置：00-seed 已建基线。

actions.action: Tap the add-record floating action button on the home screen
Create an EXPENDITURE record: amount 88, add a charge (手续费) of 2, add a concession (优惠) of 8, select a category, select asset "测试现金", attach a tag, then save
Verify the new record appears in the record list
Open the record just created to view its detail
Edit the record: change amount to 99, then save
Verify the record now shows amount 99 in the list
Verify the record no longer appears in the list and the app does not crash
